questions.question: Hotel industry mein 'Front of the House' area kise kehte hain?

options.B: Jahan guest direct staff se interact karte hain, jaise lobby aur reception
options.C: Staff ke liye rest karne ki jagah

questions.explanation: Front of the House woh areas hote hain jahan guests ka aana-jaana hota hai aur woh staff se seedhe milte hain, jaise ki lobby, reception, aur restaurants.

questions.question: Front Office department ka head kaun hota hai?

options.B: Front Office Manager
options.C: Housekeeping Manager

questions.explanation: Front Office Manager poore front office department ke operations ke liye responsible hota hai.

questions.question: Ek 'Boutique Hotel' ki kya khaasiyat hoti hai?

options.A: Yeh bahut bada hota hai, 500 se zyada rooms
options.B: Yeh airport ke paas hota hai
options.C: Yeh chhota, stylish aur unique theme wala hota hai
options.D: Yeh sirf business travelers ke liye hota hai

questions.explanation: Boutique hotels aam taur par chhote hote hain aur unka design, decor aur service bahut unique aur personalized hoti hai.

questions.question: Front Office staff ki sabse important quality kya honi chahiye?

options.B: Excellent communication aur interpersonal skills
options.C: Khana banane ki skill

questions.explanation: Guest se aache se baat karna aur unki zarooraton ko samajhna front office staff ke liye sabse zaroori hai.

questions.question: 'Concierge' ka hotel mein kya role hota hai?

options.B: Guest ko local information, tour booking, aur transport arrange karne mein help karna
options.C: Hotel ka account manage karna

questions.explanation: Concierge ek guest service expert hota hai jo guests ko hotel ke bahar ki activities aur services ke liye assist karta hai.

questions.question: Hotel mein 'EP' plan ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Emergency Plan
options.C: Extra Person plan

questions.explanation: European Plan (EP) ka matlab hai ki guest ke tariff mein sirf room ka किराया shamil hai, khana nahi.

questions.question: Front Office ko hotel ka 'Nerve Center' kyun kaha jaata hai?

options.A: Kyunki wahan bahut shor hota hai
options.B: Kyunki yeh 24 ghante kaam karta hai
options.C: Kyunki yahin se saare departments coordinate karte hain aur saari information manage hoti hai
options.D: Kyunki yeh hotel ke center mein hota hai

questions.explanation: Front Office hotel ke sabhi departments ke beech communication ka mukhya kendra hota hai, isliye ise 'Nerve Center' ya 'Hub' kaha jaata hai.

questions.question: Ek 'Motel' aur 'Hotel' mein main difference kya hai?

options.A: Motel me swimming pool nahi hota
options.B: Motel me khana nahi milta
options.C: Motel aam taur par highways par hote hain aur parking room ke paas hoti hai

questions.explanation: Motel (Motorist Hotel) khas taur par car se travel karne walon ke liye banaye jaate hain aur inki parking suvidha room ke bilkul paas hoti hai.

questions.question: Front Office aur Housekeeping department ke beech coordination kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Staff ki shift decide karne ke liye
options.B: Rooms ki status (clean, dirty, ready) ko update karne ke liye
options.C: Menu decide karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Dono departments ke beech sahi coordination se hi pata chalta hai ki kaun sa room guest ko dene ke liye taiyaar hai, jisse check-in process smooth hota hai.

questions.question: Room tariff decide karte samay kaun sa factor sabse kam important hai?

options.B: Season (peak/off-peak)
options.C: Hotel ke General Manager ka naam

questions.explanation: Room tariff room ki quality, demand, season aur competition par depend karta hai. General Manager ka naam ismein koi role nahi play karta.

questions.question: Bell Desk ka mukhya kaam kya hai?

options.B: Guest ka luggage handle karna aur unhe room tak escort karna
options.C: Reservations lena

questions.explanation: Bell Desk staff (Bell Boy/Bell Hop) guest ke luggage ko safely unke room tak pahunchane aur wahan se laane ke liye responsible hote hain.

questions.question: 'MAP' meal plan ka poora naam kya hai?

options.B: Modified American Plan
options.C: Maximum Available Price

questions.explanation: Modified American Plan (MAP) mein room rent ke saath ek breakfast aur ek lunch ya dinner shamil hota hai.

questions.question: Hotel ke different departments mein se kaun sa 'Support Center' ya 'Back of the House' ka hissa hai?

options.B: Lobby
options.C: Human Resources Department

questions.explanation: Back of the House woh departments hote hain jahan guest ka direct interaction nahi hota, jaise ki HR, Accounts, Kitchen, Laundry.

questions.question: Ek 'Suite' room kya hota hai?

options.B: Ek room jisme multiple beds ho
options.C: Ek room jisme ek living/sitting area aur ek alag bedroom ho

questions.explanation: Suite ek luxury room type hai jisme kam se kam ek alag bedroom aur ek living area hota hai.

questions.question: Front Office staff ko hamesha 'well-groomed' rehna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Isse salary badhti hai
options.C: Hotel ki professional image maintain karne aur guest par accha impression daalne ke liye

questions.explanation: Front office staff hotel ka chehra hote hain. Unka saaf-suthra aur professional dikhna hotel ki reputation ke liye bahut important hai.

questions.question: Kaun sa department room ki sale aur revenue management ke liye primarily responsible hai?

options.B: Food & Beverage
options.C: Front Office & Sales

questions.explanation: Front Office room sales ko directly handle karta hai aur Sales & Marketing department ke saath milkar revenue ko maximize karne ki strategy banata hai.

questions.question: 'STAR' classification of hotels in India kaun si body karti hai?

options.B: Ministry of Tourism, Government of India
options.C: Federation of Hotel & Restaurant Associations of India (FHRAI)
options.D: Har hotel khud decide karta hai

questions.explanation: India mein hotels ko star rating (1-star, 5-star etc.) Ministry of Tourism ke under aane wali committee, HRACC (Hotel & Restaurant Approval & Classification Committee), deti hai.

questions.question: Guest Cycle ka pehla stage kaun sa hai?

options.B: Pre-Arrival
options.C: Occupancy

questions.explanation: Guest Cycle Pre-Arrival stage se shuru hota hai, jisme guest reservation karta hai aur hotel uski aane ki taiyari karta hai.

questions.question: Ek 'Walk-in' guest kaun hota hai?

options.A: Jiske paas bahut saara luggage ho
options.B: Jo bina reservation ke room lene aata hai
options.C: Jo sirf lobby mein walk karta hai
options.D: Jo hotel staff ka relative ho

questions.explanation: Walk-in guest woh hota hai jo bina kisi prior booking ya reservation ke seedhe hotel mein room lene ke liye aata hai.

questions.question: 'Guaranteed Reservation' ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Guest ko room sasta milta hai
options.B: Hotel guest ke late aane par bhi room ko hold karke rakhta hai
options.C: Guest ko free breakfast milta hai
options.D: Guest kabhi bhi reservation cancel kar sakta hai

questions.explanation: Guaranteed reservation mein guest credit card ya advance payment se booking confirm karta hai, isliye hotel uske liye room reserve rakhta hai, chahe woh late check-in kare.

questions.question: Reservation request lete samay sabse important information kya hai?

options.B: Guest ka naam, contact number, arrival/departure dates, aur room type
options.C: Guest ki job kya hai
options.D: Guest kahan se aa raha hai

questions.explanation: Ek valid reservation ke liye guest ka naam, contact details, aane aur jaane ki tareekh, aur kis tarah ka room chahiye, yeh jaankari sabse zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar ek guest 'tentative' reservation karwata hai, to iska kya matlab hai?

options.B: Reservation abhi pakka nahi hai aur ek cut-off date tak confirm karna hoga
options.C: Guest ne payment kar di hai

questions.explanation: Tentative reservation ek provisional booking hoti hai, jise guest ko ek nishchit tareekh tak confirm karna hota hai, warna woh automatically cancel ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Guest Cycle ka 'Occupancy' stage kab shuru hota hai?

options.B: Jab guest check-in complete kar leta hai aur room mein chala jaata hai
options.C: Jab guest check-out karta hai
options.D: Jab guest hotel ke baare mein online review likhta hai

questions.explanation: Occupancy stage guest ke check-in se lekar check-out tak ka samay hota hai, jiske dauraan woh hotel ki services ka istemal karta hai.

questions.question: 'Overbooking' ki situation kya hoti hai?

options.A: Jab hotel mein saare rooms khali ho
options.B: Jab hotel available rooms se zyada reservations le leta hai
options.C: Jab guest extra services book karta hai
options.D: Jab hotel ko bahut saare positive reviews milte hain

questions.explanation: Overbooking ek strategy hai jisme hotel 'no-shows' (confirm karke na aane wale guests) ko anticipate karke, apne total rooms se zyada booking accept karta hai taaki occupancy maximize ho sake.

questions.question: Agar overbooking ki wajah se guest ko room nahi mil paata, to hotel ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Guest se maafi maang kar unhe wapas bhej dena chahiye
options.B: Guest ko lobby mein intezaar karne ko kehna chahiye
options.C: Guest ke liye kisi doosre comparable hotel mein 'walk' karwana chahiye aur transport ka kharcha uthana chahiye
options.D: Guest ko discount coupon de dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Professional tareeka yeh hai ki hotel guest ko 'walk' karaye, yaani unke liye kisi nazdeeki, barabari ke hotel mein room book kare aur unhe wahan tak pahunchane ka intezam bhi kare.

questions.question: 'CRS' ka reservation system mein kya matlab hai?

options.B: Central Reservation System
options.C: Computerized Room Service

questions.explanation: Central Reservation System (CRS) ek centralized system hai jise hotel chains use karti hain, jisse ek hi jagah se sabhi properties ki reservation manage ki jaa sakti hai.

questions.question: Guest Cycle ka aakhri stage kaun sa hai?

options.B: Pre-Arrival
options.C: Occupancy

questions.explanation: Departure stage guest cycle ka ant hota hai, jisme guest bill settle karta hai, room khali karta hai aur hotel se jaata hai.

questions.question: Reservation form mein 'ETA' ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.B: Early Transfer Available
options.C: Estimated Time of Arrival

questions.explanation: ETA yaani Estimated Time of Arrival, jisse hotel ko guest ke aane ke anumanit samay ka pata chalta hai aur woh uske liye taiyari kar sakte hain.

questions.question: 'No-show' kise kehte hain?

options.A: Ek guest jo bina bataye check-out kar de
options.B: Ek guest jo reservation confirm karne ke baad bina inform kiye hotel nahi aata
options.C: Ek guest jo TV show nahi dekhta
options.D: Ek guest jo complaint nahi karta

questions.explanation: No-show woh guest hota hai jisne guaranteed reservation ki ho lekin woh bina cancel karaye check-in ke liye nahi aata.

questions.question: Group reservation handle karte waqt kya cheez sabse zaroori hai?

options.A: Har guest se alag-alag baat karna
options.B: Ek 'Rooming List' taiyaar karna jisme sabhi guests ke naam aur room allocation ho
options.C: Sabko ek hi floor par room dena

questions.explanation: Rooming list ek master document hota hai jisme group ke sabhi members ki details, room sharing information aur special requests hoti hain, jo smooth check-in ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Reservation ke liye kaun sa source of business sabse zyada commission charge karta hai?

options.B: Direct phone call to hotel
options.C: Online Travel Agents (OTAs) jaise MakeMyTrip, Booking.com

questions.explanation: OTAs hotel ko business to dete hain, lekin woh har booking par ek substantial commission (15-25% ya zyada) charge karte hain, jo baki channels se kahin zyada hai.

questions.question: Agar koi guest apne pet (e.g., dog) ke saath aana chahta hai, to reservation agent ko kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Hotel ki 'Pet Policy'
options.C: Pet ka naam
options.D: Guest se extra charge maangna chahiye

questions.explanation: Sabse pehle hotel ki pet policy check karni chahiye ki kya pets allowed hain, aur agar hain to uske kya niyam aur shartein (charges, size limits, etc.) hain.

questions.question: 'Whitney System' kya tha?

options.B: Ek manual reservation aur room tracking system
options.C: Ek security system

questions.explanation: Computer aane se pehle, Whitney System ek detailed manual system tha jisme reservation slips aur room racks ka istemal karke guest information aur room status ko track kiya jaata tha.

questions.question: Guest history ka data maintain karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Guest ko blackmail karne ke liye
options.B: Police ko information dene ke liye
options.C: Guest ke dobara aane par unhe personalized service dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Guest history se unki pasand-napasand (e.g., favourite room, newspaper) ka pata chalta hai, jisse unke agle visit ko aur behtar banaya ja sakta hai aur guest loyalty badhti hai.

questions.question: Guest ke check-in ke samay sabse pehla kadam kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Guest ko warmly welcome karna
options.C: ID proof maangna

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi process se pehle guest ko ek muskaan ke saath welcome karna ek accha first impression banata hai aur guest ko comfortable feel karata hai.

questions.question: Check-in ke dauraan 'Registration Card' bharwane ka kya maksad hai?

options.B: Guest ka personal data collect karna
options.C: Guest aur hotel ke beech ek legal contract banana aur guest details record karna

questions.explanation: Registration card ek legal document hai jisme guest ki details, stay duration, aur signature hote hain, jo guest aur hotel ke beech agreement ka saboot hota hai.

questions.question: Ek foreign guest se check-in ke time kaun se documents lena anivarya (mandatory) hai?

options.B: Passport aur valid Visa
options.C: Sirf Passport

questions.explanation: Indian law ke anusaar, har foreign national ko check-in ke samay apna passport aur valid visa dikhana zaroori hai. Hotel ko iski copy C-Form ke saath submit karni hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar guest check-in ke time par complain kare ki unhe jo room diya gaya hai woh pasand nahi, toh receptionist ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Kehna ki ab kuch nahi ho sakta
options.B: Guest ki problem ko samajhna aur availability ke hisaab se doosra room offer karna
options.C: Manager se baat karne ko kehna

questions.explanation: Ek acche receptionist ko guest ki pareshani sunkar, maafi maangni chahiye aur agar संभव ho to turant unki pasand ka doosra room dikhana chahiye.

questions.question: 'Pre-authorization' on a credit card ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Guest ke account se paise kaat lena
options.B: Guest ke credit card ki validity check karna aur ek anumanit amount hold karna
options.C: Guest ka credit score check karna
options.D: Credit card ki photo copy lena

questions.explanation: Pre-authorization ek process hai jisme hotel guest ke card par ek certain amount (room rent + incidentals) block ya hold kar deta hai, yeh ensure karne ke liye ki guest ke paas sufficient funds hain.

questions.question: Check-out ke samay guest ke bill ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Guest Folio
options.C: Registration Card

questions.explanation: Guest Folio ek detailed statement hota hai jisme guest ke stay ke dauraan kiye gaye sabhi kharchon (room rent, food, laundry, etc.) ka hisaab hota hai.

questions.question: 'Express Check-out' suvidha kin guests ke liye sabse upyukt hai?

options.A: Jo cash mein payment karna chahte hain
options.B: Jinke paas bahut saara samaan hai
options.C: Jo jaldi mein hain aur jinhone apni credit card details pehle se de rakhi hain
options.D: Jo pehli baar hotel mein aaye hain

questions.explanation: Express Check-out un guests ke liye hai jo subah jaldi jaana chahte hain. Woh raat mein hi bill check kar lete hain aur hotel unke card se payment charge karke unhe email se bill bhej deta hai.

questions.question: Agar ek guest 'Late Check-out' request karta hai to front office ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Bina soche permission de deni chahiye
options.C: Us din ki occupancy check karni chahiye aur hotel policy ke anusaar decision lena chahiye (shayad extra charge ke saath)
options.D: Guest ko extra payment ke liye force karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Late check-out request ko aane wali bookings (occupancy) ke adhaar par decide kiya jaata hai. Agar room ki zaroorat nahi hai, to hotel thode extra charge ke saath ya free mein bhi permission de sakta hai.

questions.question: Room key issue karte samay kya savdhani baratni chahiye?

options.A: Guest ka room number zor se bolna chahiye
options.B: Guest ka ID verify karna chahiye aur room number ko zor se nahi bolna chahiye
options.C: Kisi ko bhi key de deni chahiye jo guest ka naam bataye
options.D: Key ko counter par chhod dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Guest ki security ke liye, ID verify karna zaroori hai aur room number ko kabhi bhi lobby mein zor se nahi bolna chahiye, taaki koi anjaan vyakti use na sun le.

questions.question: Check-out process ka antim step kya hai?

options.B: Guest ko bill explain karna
options.C: Guest ko ek acchi journey wish karna aur unse feedback lena
options.D: Guest ka luggage room se laana

questions.explanation: Sabhi formalities poori hone ke baad, guest ko ek positive farewell dena, unse unke stay ka anubhav poochna aur unhe dobara aane ke liye invite karna, ek acchi service ka prateek hai.

questions.question: 'C-Form' kya hai aur yeh kin guests ke liye bhara jaata hai?

options.B: Corporate booking form
options.C: Ek legal form jo sabhi foreign nationals ke liye bharkar FRRO ko submit karna hota hai

questions.explanation: C-Form ek mandatory document hai jisme har foreign guest ki details (passport, visa, etc.) bhari jaati hain aur 24 ghante ke andar Foreigners Regional Registration Office (FRRO) ko online submit ki jaati hai.

questions.question: Agar guest check-out ke time apne bill mein kisi charge ko lekar 'dispute' karta hai, to kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Charge ko bina check kiye hata dena chahiye
options.C: Politely guest ki baat sunni chahiye, charge ko verify karna chahiye (e.g., restaurant se sign ki hui slip maang kar), aur fir situation ko handle karna chahiye
options.D: Manager ke aane tak guest ko rok kar rakhna chahiye

questions.explanation: Aise mein patience rakhna zaroori hai. Guest ki baat sunein, unhe proof dikhayein (agar hai), aur agar galti hotel ki hai to use turant sudharein. Agar zaroorat pade to manager ko involve karein.

questions.question: Room change procedure mein, front office ko sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Naye room ki availability check karna
options.C: Bell boy ko bulana

questions.explanation: Sabse pehla step yeh confirm karna hai ki guest ki zaroorat ke hisaab se koi doosra room available hai ya nahi. Uske baad hi aage ka process shuru ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Ek 'Scanty Baggage' guest ke liye hotel kya policy apna sakta hai?

options.A: Unhe room dene se mana kar dena
options.B: Unse poore stay ka payment advance mein maangna
options.C: Unpar extra nazar rakhna

questions.explanation: Scanty baggage (bahut kam samaan) wale guests ko 'skipper' risk (bina pay kiye chale jaana) maana ja sakta hai. Isliye, hotel suraksha ke liye unse advance payment ke liye request kar sakta hai.

questions.question: 'Due Back' situation kab hoti hai?

options.A: Jab guest hotel ko paise deta hai
options.B: Jab hotel ko guest ko paise wapas karne hote hain, lekin cashier ke paas change nahi hota
options.C: Jab guest check-out karna bhool jaata hai
options.D: Jab guest extra services leta hai

questions.explanation: Due back tab hota hai jab guest cash payment karta hai aur hotel cashier ko use change wapas karna hota hai. Cashier iska note rakhta hai aur baad mein pay karta hai.

questions.question: Check-in ke samay guest ko room ke features kaise batane chahiye?

options.A: Kuch nahi batana chahiye, guest khud dekh lega
options.B: Briefly aur clearly main features jaise Wi-Fi, breakfast timing, aur AC controls ke baare mein batana chahiye
options.C: Ek booklet de deni chahiye

questions.explanation: Ek chhota sa orientation guest ko comfortable feel karata hai. Zaroori jaankari jaise Wi-Fi password, breakfast ka samay aur jagah, aur TV/AC remote ke baare mein batana ek acchi service hai.

questions.question: VIP guest ke check-in ko kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.A: Unhe bhi normal guest ki tarah line mein lagne ko kehna chahiye
options.B: Unke aane se pehle hi pre-registration formalities poori kar leni chahiye aur unhe seedhe room mein escort karna chahiye
options.C: Unse extra documents maangne chahiye
options.D: Unka check-in process jaan boojh kar dheere karna chahiye

questions.explanation: VIPs ke liye check-in process ko behad smooth aur quick banaya jaata hai. Aksar, saari paperwork pehle se taiyaar hoti hai aur ek senior manager unhe personally welcome karke room tak le jaata hai.

questions.question: Hotel mein telephone operator ko aur kya kaha jaata hai?

options.B: Front Office Assistant
options.C: Bell Captain

questions.explanation: Telephone exchange system ko PBX (Private Branch Exchange) kehte hain, aur ise operate karne wale ko PBX Operator kaha jaata hai.

questions.question: Phone uthate samay standard phrase kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Haan boliye?
options.C: Good Morning/Afternoon, [Hotel Name], [Your Name] speaking. How may I help you?

questions.explanation: Ek professional greeting mein hotel ka naam, apna naam aur madad offer karna shamil hona chahiye. Isse caller par accha prabhav padta hai.

questions.question: Agar guest kisi cheez ki complain kar raha ho, to aapka sabse pehla reaction kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Guest ko galti manne par majboor karna
options.C: Guest ki baat ko dhyaan se sunna aur unse maafi maangna

questions.explanation: Complaint handle karne ka pehla rule hai 'Listen and Empathize'. Guest ki baat sunein, unki pareshani ko samjhein aur unhe hui asuvidha ke liye maafi maange, chahe galti kisi ki bhi ho.

questions.question: 'Body Language' communication ka kaun sa type hai?

options.B: Written Communication
options.C: Non-Verbal Communication

questions.explanation: Body language, jaise ki gestures, posture, aur facial expressions, Non-Verbal communication ka hissa hai, jo bina shabdon ke message convey karta hai.

questions.question: Ek guest ko 'wake-up call' dene ka sahi tareeka kya hai?

options.A: Sirf ek baar call karke phone rakh dena
options.B: Politely 'Good morning, this is your wake-up call for 6 AM' kehna aur guest ke acknowledge karne tak line par rehna
options.C: Guest ke room mein jaakar darwaza khatkhatana

questions.explanation: Sahi tareeka hai ki guest ko greet karein, call ka reason batayein aur confirm karein ki woh jaag gaye hain. Agar woh phone nahi uthate to policy ke anusaar 5-10 minute baad dobara try karna chahiye.

questions.question: Agar aapko guest ki baat samajh nahi aa rahi hai (language barrier ke kaaran), to aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Andaza lagakar kuch bhi kar dena
options.B: Guest ko ignore karna
options.C: Politely dobara poochhna ya kisi aise colleague ki madad lena jo woh bhasha jaanta ho

questions.explanation: Galti karne se behtar hai ki aap politely repeat karne ke liye kahein ('Pardon me, could you please repeat that?') ya kisi colleague se help lein jise bhasha aati ho.

questions.question: Guest ki privacy maintain karne ke liye, aapko kya nahi karna chahiye?

options.A: Guest ka room number kisi doosre vyakti ko batana
options.B: Guest ki personal information ko confidential rakhna
options.C: Room mein enter karne se pehle knock karna
options.D: Guest ke documents ko surakshit rakhna

questions.explanation: Guest ka room number, naam ya koi bhi personal detail kisi bhi anjaan vyakti ke saath share karna unki privacy aur security ka ullanghan hai.

questions.question: Complaint handling mein 'HEAT' technique ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Hear, Empathize, Apologize, Take action
options.C: Help, Engage, Apologize, Talk

questions.explanation: HEAT ek popular complaint handling technique hai: Hear the guest out (Sunein), Empathize with them (Humdardi jatayein), Apologize for the inconvenience (Maafi maangein), and Take action to resolve (Samasya ka samadhan karein).

questions.question: Ek 'Log Book' front desk par kyun rakhi jaati hai?

options.A: Guest ke autograph lene ke liye
options.B: Shift ke dauraan hui important ghatnaon aur information ko agli shift ke staff tak pahunchane ke liye
options.C: Apne personal notes likhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Log book ek communication tool hai jisme ek shift ka staff doosri shift ke staff ke liye zaroori messages, guest requests, complaints, ya koi bhi aisi jaankari likhta hai jo unke liye janna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar ek guest aapse aisi information maange jiske baare mein aapko nahi pata, to aapka best response kya hoga?

options.B: Galat information de dena
options.C: Kehna 'Please give me a moment, I will find out for you'
options.D: Guest ko khud dhoondhne ke liye kehna

questions.explanation: Kabhi bhi 'mujhe nahi pata' kehkar baat khatam na karein. Hamesha information dhoondhne ki koshish karein ya guest ko sahi व्यक्ति/department ke paas guide karein. Yeh service-oriented approach hai.

questions.question: Guest se baat karte samay 'active listening' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Guest ki baat kaatna
options.C: Guest ki baat ko poore dhyaan se sunna, samajhna aur zaroorat padne par questions poochhna

questions.explanation: Active listening ka matlab hai ki aap sirf sun nahi rahe, balki samajh bhi rahe hain. Isme eye contact maintain karna, nod karna aur clarifying questions poochhna shamil hai.

questions.question: Concierge desk ka primary function kya nahi hai?

options.B: Tour book karna
options.C: Guest ke bill banana

questions.explanation: Guest ke bill banana aur payment handle karna Front Desk Cashier ka kaam hai, na ki Concierge ka. Concierge guest services aur activities se related kaam karta hai.

questions.question: Agar ek gusse wale guest se deal karna ho to kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Unse bhi gusse mein baat karni chahiye
options.B: Shaant rehna chahiye, unhe ek private jagah par le jaakar baat karni chahiye aur unki problem solve karne ki koshish karni chahiye
options.C: Unko ignore karna chahiye jab tak woh shaant na ho jaayein

questions.explanation: Gusse wale guest ko public area se alag le jaakar baat karne se scene create nahi hota. Shaant rehkar unki baat sunne se unka gussa kam hota hai aur solution dhoondhna aasan ho jaata hai.

questions.question: 'Upselling' ka front office mein kya matlab hai?

options.A: Guest ko kam daam mein room dena
options.B: Guest ko unke book kiye gaye room se behtar (aur mehanga) room lene ke liye prerit karna
options.C: Guest ka samaan upar ke floor par le jaana

questions.explanation: Upselling ek sales technique hai jisme guest ko ek higher category ka room (e.g., suite) uske fayde batakar becha jaata hai, jisse hotel ka revenue badhta hai.

questions.question: Mail aur message handle karte waqt, agar guest hotel mein nahi hai, to kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Mail ko khol kar padhna chahiye
options.C: Mail par 'Guest not in hotel' mark karke 'Return to Sender' kar dena chahiye
options.D: Mail ko reception par rakh lena chahiye

questions.explanation: Agar guest hotel mein रुका nahi hai ya check-out kar chuka hai, to standard procedure ke tehat us mail ko sender ko wapas bhej dena chahiye.

questions.question: Positive guest relations banane ke liye sabse accha tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Guest ko naam se bulana aur unki zarooraton ka dhyaan rakhna
options.C: Guest se baat hi na karna
options.D: Sirf VIP guests par dhyaan dena

questions.explanation: Guest ko unke naam se address karne se unhe special aur valued feel hota hai, jo ek strong guest relationship banane mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Telephone par call hold par rakhne se pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Bina bataye hold par rakh dena
options.B: Caller se permission leni chahiye
options.C: Call disconnect kar dena

questions.explanation: Professional etiquette ke anusaar, hamesha caller se poochhna chahiye, 'Sir/Ma'am, may I put you on hold for a moment?' aur unke haan kehne par hi hold karna chahiye.

questions.question: 'PMS' ka front office accounting mein kya matlab hai?

options.B: Payment Management Service
options.C: Personnel Management System

questions.explanation: Property Management System (PMS) woh software hai jise hotels reservation, check-in/out, billing aur doosre front office operations ko manage karne ke liye use karte hain.

questions.question: Guest ke folio mein 'debit' entry ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.B: Guest ke account mein koi charge add hua hai (e.g., room rent, food bill)
options.C: Guest ko discount mila hai

questions.explanation: Debit ka matlab hai guest ke upar udhaar badhna. Jab bhi guest koi service use karta hai, uske folio mein ek debit entry ki jaati hai.

questions.question: 'Night Audit' kab kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Dopahar 12 baje
options.C: Raat mein, jab hotel mein activity sabse kam hoti hai

questions.explanation: Night Audit raat ke samay (late night/early morning) kiya jaata hai taaki din bhar ke saare financial transactions ko check, verify aur balance kiya ja sake aur agle din ke liye reports taiyaar ki ja sakein.

questions.question: Guest ke folio mein 'credit' entry ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.A: Guest ne room service order ki hai
options.B: Guest ne hotel se udhaar liya hai
options.C: Guest ne payment ki hai ya koi advance diya hai
options.D: Guest ka bill badh gaya hai

questions.explanation: Credit ka matlab hai guest ka udhaar kam hona. Jab guest payment karta hai, to uske folio mein credit entry ki jaati hai, jo debit amount ko kam karti hai.

questions.question: Agar check-out ke baad pata chale ki guest ne minibar se kuch consume kiya tha jiska charge nahi laga, to us charge ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Late Charge
options.C: Extra Charge

questions.explanation: Late Charge woh charge hota hai jo guest ke check-out aur bill settlement ke baad front office ko pata chalta hai. Hotel ise guest ke card par charge karne ki koshish kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Front Office Cashier ka 'float' kya hota hai?

options.B: Woh cash amount jo use shift ke shuru mein transactions ke liye diya jaata hai
options.C: Guest se mili hui tips

questions.explanation: Float ya Cash Bank woh fixed amount of cash hota hai jo cashier ko apni shift shuru karne se pehle diya jaata hai, taaki woh guests ko change de sake aur chhote-mote cash transactions kar sake.

questions.question: Night Auditor ka ek mukhya kaam kya hai?

options.B: Room rates ko double karna
options.C: Din bhar ke accounts ko balance karna aur 'End of Day' process run karna
options.D: Morning staff ke liye breakfast banana

questions.explanation: Night Auditor ka primary role din bhar ke sabhi departmental sales (room, F&B, etc.) ko cross-check karna, guest folios ko verify karna aur hotel ke accounts ko close (balance) karna hota hai.

questions.question: Ek 'Paid-Out' voucher kab banaya jaata hai?

options.A: Jab guest advance payment karta hai
options.B: Jab hotel guest ke bihaaf par kisi ko cash payment karta hai (e.g., taxi fare)
options.C: Jab guest credit card se pay karta hai
options.D: Jab guest ko discount diya jaata hai

questions.explanation: Paid-out tab hota hai jab hotel apni cash drawer se guest ke liye koi chhota-mota kharcha karta hai, aur fir woh amount guest ke folio mein debit kar diya jaata hai.

questions.question: Agar ek company apne employee ke stay ka bill pay karegi, to is arrangement ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Cash-only
options.C: Bill-to-Company / Direct Billing

questions.explanation: Direct Billing ya Bill-to-Company ek aisi suvidha hai jisme ek authorized company apne employee ke stay ke charges ko direct hotel ko pay karti hai, guest ko check-out par pay nahi karna padta.

questions.question: PMS mein 'Room Status Discrepancy' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Jab guest room change karta hai
options.B: Jab Front Office ke record mein room status (e.g., vacant) aur Housekeeping ke record mein status (e.g., occupied) alag-alag ho
options.C: Jab room ka lock kaam nahi kar raha ho
options.D: Jab guest ne room book kiya lekin aaya nahi

questions.explanation: Yeh ek aisi sthiti hai jahan dono departments ke paas ek hi room ke baare mein alag-alag jaankari hoti hai. Isse revenue loss ya guest inconvenience ho sakta hai, isliye ise turant solve karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: 'High Balance Report' ka kya upyog hai?

options.A: Yeh un guests ki list dikhati hai jinhone sabse zyada tips di hai
options.B: Yeh un guests ki list dikhati hai jinka outstanding bill hotel ki credit limit se zyada ho gaya hai
options.C: Yeh hotel ki total income dikhati hai
options.D: Yeh staff ki salary report hai

questions.explanation: High Balance Report se un guest accounts ko monitor kiya jaata hai jinka bill ek certain limit ko cross kar gaya hai. Fir hotel unse partial payment ke liye request kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Guest check-out ke baad, uska folio kahan transfer ho jaata hai?

options.B: Guest ko de diya jaata hai
options.C: Active folios se 'City Ledger' (Accounts Receivable) mein

questions.explanation: City Ledger hotel ke accounts department ka hissa hai jahan un sabhi non-guest accounts ya check-out kar chuke guests jinka payment baaki hai (jaise Bill-to-Company) ka record rakha jaata hai.

questions.question: Kaun si report night auditor ko roz banani hoti hai jo hotel ki performance batati hai?

options.B: Manager's Report / Daily Summary Report
options.C: Guest complaint report

questions.explanation: Manager's Report mein us din ki key statistics hoti hain jaise ki occupancy percentage, Average Daily Rate (ADR), RevPAR, aur total revenue, jisse management ko hotel ki performance ka andaza lagta hai.

questions.question: Credit card se payment lete samay CVV number ka kya use hai?

options.A: Yeh cardholder ka naam batata hai
options.B: Yeh ek security feature hai jo online ya phone par transaction ko verify karne ke liye use hota hai
options.C: Yeh card ki expiry date batata hai

questions.explanation: CVV (Card Verification Value) card ke peeche ek 3-digit number hota hai jo fraud ko rokne mein madad karta hai, yeh saabit karke ki transaction ke samay card physically maujood hai.

questions.question: ADR ka poora naam kya hai?

options.B: Average Daily Rate
options.C: Additional Daily Revenue

questions.explanation: Average Daily Rate (ADR) ek metric hai jo total room revenue ko beche gaye rooms ki sankhya se divide karke nikala jaata hai. Isse ek room ka average rent pata chalta hai.

questions.question: Agar guest currency exchange karwana chahta hai, to front office cashier ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Black market rate par exchange karna chahiye
options.B: Exchange karne se mana kar dena chahiye
options.C: Agar hotel authorized hai, to current exchange rate ke hisaab se karna chahiye aur guest ka ID record karna chahiye
options.D: Apni marzi se koi bhi rate laga dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Sirf authorized hotels hi currency exchange kar sakte hain. Unhe government dwara nirdharit niyam-kanoon ka palan karna hota hai, jisme sahi rate dena aur transaction ka record rakhna shamil hai.

questions.question: 'Skipper' kaun hota hai?

options.A: Ek guest jo bahut tips deta hai
options.B: Ek guest jo bina bill pay kiye hotel se chala jaata hai
options.C: Hotel ka manager
options.D: Ek guest jo roz swimming karta hai

questions.explanation: A skipper is a guest who leaves the hotel without settling their bill. This results in a financial loss for the hotel.

questions.question: Hotel mein aag lagne par aapko sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Chup-chap hotel se nikal jaana
options.C: Fire alarm activate karna aur emergency services (Fire Brigade) ko call karna

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi emergency mein pehli prathmikta sabko alert karna (alarm bajakar) aur professional help (emergency services) ko bulana hoti hai.

questions.question: Guest room ki key control kyun important hai?

options.B: Guest ki safety aur security सुनिश्चित karne ke liye
options.C: Yeh hotel ki policy hai
options.D: Isse staff ka kaam badhta hai

questions.explanation: Key control se yeh sunishchit kiya jaata hai ki room keys sirf authorized logon ke paas hi ho, jisse guest ke samaan aur unki apni suraksha bani rahe.

questions.question: Agar aapko lobby mein koi laawaris (unattended) bag dikhta hai, to aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Use khol kar check karna chahiye
options.B: Use utha kar 'Lost and Found' department mein de dena chahiye
options.C: Use ignore kar dena chahiye
options.D: Turant apne supervisor ya security ko inform karna chahiye aur bag ko nahi chhoona chahiye

questions.explanation: Laawaris bag ek security threat ho sakta hai. Isliye, use chhoona nahi chahiye aur turant security ko soochit karna chahiye taaki woh aage ki karwahi kar sakein.

questions.question: Professional grooming mein kya shamil nahi hai?

options.A: Saaf aur press ki hui uniform
options.B: Neat hairstyle aur clean-shaven/well-trimmed beard
options.C: Polished shoes
options.D: Bahut zyada perfume ya jewellery pehanna

questions.explanation: Professional grooming ka matlab saaf-suthra aur presentable dikhna hai. Bahut tez perfume ya bhadkili jewellery unprofessional maani jaati hai.

questions.question: 'Lost and Found' procedure ka pehla step kya hai?

options.A: Mili hui cheez ko apne paas rakh lena
options.B: Mili hui cheez ki detail (kya hai, kahan mili, kab mili) ko ek register mein record karna
options.C: Police ko bulana
options.D: Us cheez ke maalik ko dhoondhne nikal jaana

questions.explanation: Sabse pehle har mili hui item ko aache se tag karke uski poori jaankari log book ya register mein likhni chahiye, taaki use track karna aasan ho.

questions.question: Agar koi guest medical emergency (e.g., heart attack) ka shikar ho, to Front Office staff ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Turant ambulance ya hotel ke doctor ko call karna aur first aid (agar trained ho to) dena
options.C: Guest ko unke haal par chhod dena

questions.explanation: Medical emergency mein samay bahut keemti hota hai. Pehli priority professional medical help ko bulana hai. Agar staff first aid mein trained hai, to woh madad kar sakta hai, lekin doctor ki jagah nahi le sakta.

questions.question: Ek acchi personal hygiene maintain karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Isse guest par accha impression padta hai aur beemariyan nahi failti
options.C: Isse salary badhti hai

questions.explanation: Saaf-suthra rehna na sirf professional dikhne ke liye zaroori hai, balki yeh swasthya aur suraksha ke liye bhi anivarya hai, khas kar hospitality industry mein.

questions.question: Hotel mein bomb threat call aane par, operator ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Caller se behas karna
options.C: Shaant rehkar jitni ho sake utni information (caller ki awaaz, background noise) collect karne ki koshish karna aur turant security/police ko inform karna
options.D: Is call ko mazak samajh kar ignore kar dena

questions.explanation: Aise calls ko hamesha gambhirta se lena chahiye. Bina panic kiye, call ko lamba kheenchne ki koshish karein taaki zaroori jaankari mil sake, aur saath hi saath security ko alert karein.

questions.question: Front Office staff ke liye uniform ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Yeh staff ko pehchaanne mein madad karti hai aur ek professional image banati hai
options.B: Yeh ek bekar ka kharcha hai
options.C: Isse staff ko garmi lagti hai
options.D: Yeh sirf senior staff ke liye hoti hai

questions.explanation: Uniform se staff ki asaani se pehchaan ho jaati hai, hotel brand ki image banti hai aur staff ke beech ekta aur anushasan ki bhavna aati hai.

questions.question: Agar koi guest aapse doosre guest ke baare mein personal information maangta hai, to aapka jawab kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Politely kehna chahiye ki guest privacy policy ke kaaran hum yeh jaankari share nahi kar sakte
options.C: Paise lekar information de deni chahiye
options.D: Us guest se pooch kar batana chahiye

questions.explanation: Guest ki privacy sarvopari hai. Kisi bhi haalat mein ek guest ki jaankari doosre ko nahi deni chahiye, chahe woh kitna bhi insist kare.

questions.question: Workplace par ek positive attitude rakhne se kya fayda hota hai?

options.A: Isse kaam par bura asar padta hai
options.B: Isse team ka morale badhta hai, guest satisfaction improve hoti hai aur work environment accha rehta hai
options.C: Isse sirf manager ko fayda hota hai

questions.explanation: Ek positive attitude संक्रामक hota hai. Isse na sirf aapka kaam behtar hota hai, balki aapke saathi bhi motivate hote hain aur guests ko bhi acchi service milti hai.

questions.question: Lost and Found items ko kitne samay tak sambhal kar rakhna chahiye (as per general policy)?

options.B: Ek hafta
options.C: Aam taur par 3 se 6 mahine, item ki value par depend karta hai

questions.explanation: Har hotel ki apni policy hoti hai, lekin aam taur par kam value ki cheezein 3 mahine aur zyada value ki cheezein 6 mahine tak rakhi jaati hain, jiske baad unhe donate ya dispose kar diya jaata hai.

questions.question: E-key (electronic key card) system, traditional metal key se zyada secure kyun maana jaata hai?

options.B: Kyunki har guest ke check-out ke baad key ka code badal diya jaata hai, jisse purani key bekar ho jaati hai
options.C: Kyunki yeh dikhne mein accha lagta hai
options.D: Kyunki isko copy karna aasan hai

questions.explanation: E-keys ki security is baat mein hai ki woh reprogrammable hain. Jaise hi guest check-out karta hai, uski key kaam karna band kar deti hai, aur naye guest ke liye naya code daal diya jaata hai. Isse key gum hone ka khatra kam ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Ek 'DND' (Do Not Disturb) sign ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Guest chahta hai ki unhe disturb na kiya jaaye (staff room mein enter na kare)
options.C: Room khali hai
options.D: Room mein cleaning chal rahi hai

questions.explanation: DND sign ka matlab hai ki guest aaram kar raha hai ya privacy chahta hai. Hotel staff ko (emergency ke alawa) us room mein enter nahi karna chahiye aur na hi phone karna chahiye.

questions.question: Agar aap shift ke dauraan thaka hua ya beemar mehsoos kar rahe hain, to aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Apne supervisor ko inform karna chahiye
options.C: Reception par so jaana chahiye
options.D: Bina bataye ghar chale jaana chahiye

questions.explanation: Apni tabiyat ke baare mein supervisor ko batana zaroori hai. Isse woh aapke liye replacement dhoondh sakte hain aur yeh bhi ensure kar sakte hain ki aapki wajah se service quality par asar na pade aur aapko zaroori medical help mil sake.
